randomEvents.title: Mega rally speaker boost
randomEvents.copy: Your rally van got louder. Speed up for a bit.

randomEvents.title: Poster printer jam
randomEvents.copy: The printer needs a thappad. Speed drops for a bit.

randomEvents.title: Tea stall debate won
randomEvents.copy: Local voters liked the joke. Nearby influence grows.

randomEvents.title: Sticker wave
randomEvents.copy: Volunteers pasted stickers across the route.

randomEvents.title: Rain delay
randomEvents.copy: Everyone waited under the same tent. No damage, only drama.
